overview.description: The Innovator U.S. Equity Accelerated 9 Buffer ETF - October (XBOC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in enhanced growth alternatives. The fund aims for 2x the price return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF (SPY), subject to an upside return cap and downside buffer over a specific holdings period. XBOC was launched on Oct 1, 2021 and is issued by Innovator.
